next_suggestion: Next round: dispatch SCRIPTS-M01 (parallel-dispatch.sh TASK_ID sanitization) as first derived fix from audit-2026-07-03-012. Route-fix kind → reuse existing scripts area worktree if any, else create new.

audit_findings.finding: TASK_ID unsanitized in branch names and filesystem paths — injection/traversal vector
audit_findings.remediation: Add validate_task_id() rejecting /, .., spaces, non-alnum except -_

audit_findings.finding: git reset --hard HEAD@{1} fallback on test failure can destroy uncommitted WIP
audit_findings.remediation: Check for uncommitted changes before hard reset; use git revert or stash+reset

audit_findings.finding: $CAL interpolated in python -c string literal — injection if path contains quotes
audit_findings.remediation: Pass via sys.argv instead of string interpolation

audit_findings.finding: Bare except clauses swallow IOError/KeyboardInterrupt; fail-open on parse error
audit_findings.remediation: Narrow to specific exceptions; consider fail-closed on corrupt files

audit_findings.finding: PROMPT single-quote definition fragile against future edits with apostrophes
load_json_robust catches all Exception including IOError, masking infra problems
